description: For the woman with an modern, dynamic lifestyle, the floral fruity Pure Lightness from adidas is the right choice. Bottled in a light blue flacon it has top notes of melon and red apple middle notes of jasmine, magnolia, violet and lily-of-the-valley and a base note of musk.Quantity: 50 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
